75213.subject: 📉 Bitcoin falls below $60K as US strikes Iran
75213.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $59,764 (-0.8%) | **ETH** $1,570 (-0.7%) | **SOL** $72 (0.8%)

* [US strikes](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2071014340354883996?s=20) Iranian targets on the Strait of Hormuz — US and Iran agree again to [halt strikes](https://x.com/Osint613/status/2071330492306092297?s=20) ahead of meeting tomorrow

* Strategy’s drops to a 52-week low of $82 as its[ mNAV falls below 1](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2070633620717629653?s=20)

* ANSEM surges to a local high over [$120M market cap](https://dexscreener.com/solana/fnzky6x7entq1er3d225dqyt7ybfka4pskbmqhb8l3cc) as Ansem [teases airdrop](https://x.com/blknoiz06/status/2070871430191800832?s=20) — [Pump Fun flips Hyperliquid](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2071207198085075175?s=20) in daily revenue on “return to memes” narrative

* Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei warns lawmakers that [open source models](https://x.com/coinbureau/status/2071330294452666695?s=20) are moving down a “very dangerous path”

* China’s Z.AI claims that its [latest models](https://x.com/verge/status/2071349942598377890?s=20) are as effective at cybersecurity tasks as Mythos

* SpaceX will join the [Nasdaq 100](https://x.com/Cointelegraph/status/2070786855679725573?s=20)

* Base identifies [sequencer bug](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2071037368422060228?s=20) as culprit for 2 outages last week

* Galaxy cuts odds of CLARITY Act passing this year to [50%](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2071468128954188118?s=20) — Polymarket [44%](https://polymarket.com/event/clarity-act-signed-into-law-in-2026)

* Bitmine is less than [0.5% away ](https://x.com/Cointelegraph/status/2070862348139540774?s=20)from their 5% supply goal

* US [PMI and Jobs data](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2071221763518734404?s=20) will be released this week

* Fannie Mae closes its first [Bitcoin-backed mortgage](https://x.com/coinbureau/status/2071277764154663067?s=20)

* [CZ passes Bill Gates](https://x.com/WhaleInsider/status/2071223527273820543?s=20) in net worth

* Loopring DEX announces [shutdown](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2071366128144945621?s=20)

———————————————————————————


———

You are reading a plain text version of this post. For the best experience, copy and paste

Fear and Greed is at
16
(Extreme
Fear)
this morning. Bitcoin tested a monthly low of $58,115 last week
before bouncing back, and the market is now heading into the
final days of June with the monthly close carrying significant
technical weight. Seven straight weeks of ETF outflows have now
pulled $5.96 billion from crypto products, and the major options
expiry has passed.

The dust is settling. But the debate over what caused this
decline and who is responsible is just getting started. The
Ripple CEO is pointing fingers at Strategy's financial model.
Grayscale is calling for a $3 billion Bitcoin sale. And Saylor is
signalling he's buying more anyway.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

Grayscale's Researcher Wants Strategy To Sell Bitcoin Now

Grayscale's head of research said he hopes Strategy will sell
at least $3 billion in Bitcoin to cover its next two years of
cash obligations, arguing it would restore confidence in the
company's capital structure.

He expects Strategy to raise its dividend instead, adding
roughly $100 million in annual obligations.

What does Pandl say a Strategy Bitcoin sale would achieve for
market confidence?

Read More

75208.subject: Quick Hello from Runable!
75208.body:
Hi,

I'm Abhijeet from team Runable. You're one of our most active users, and I
wanted to reach out personally.

We're looking to feature a few people from our community, and before
anything, I'd just love to connect and hear about your experience, what's
working for you, what's getting in your way, and how Runable has been for
you so far.

Would you be open to a quick chat? Please select your preferred time slot:
https://calendly.com/abhijeet-runable/30min

Thanks for being with us,

Abhijeet
Team Runable
